behavior.auto_improveDesc: Filled in automatically; does not block delivery
behavior.gateDesc: Blocks delivery on failure and triggers a repair round
detail.pending: This check has not run yet.
dock.repairHint: The next round is fixing the failed checks. A new result is produced and the checker re-runs when it finishes.
dock.title: Delivery Checker
input.hint: This goes to the next repair round as checker input — it will not appear as a chat message.
input.label: Extra input for the next repair round
input.placeholder: e.g. run type-check first; if it still fails, just add a risk note.
report.error.description: The report could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
report.error.title: Unable to load report
report.interaction.title: Interaction cost
report.missing.description: Open a verification report with a valid run id.
report.missing.title: Missing report id
report.notFound.description: This report may have been deleted, or the link is not available to you.
report.notFound.title: Report not found
report.overview.nextFailed: Review failed checks first, then add missing evidence or adjust the implementation.
report.overview.nextPassed: All checks passed. Review the evidence if needed, then deliver.
report.overview.nextUncertain: Uncertain checks need clearer evidence before treating this report as complete.
report.overview.title: Check overview
report.status.planned: Verification is planned. The report will update when checks run.
report.status.repairing: A repair round is running. This report refreshes automatically.
report.status.verifying: Verification is running. This report refreshes automatically.
reports.empty.description: Reports appear here after a delivery checker run finishes or a standalone verification is ingested.
reports.empty.title: No verification reports yet
reports.error.description: The report list could not be loaded. Try again to refresh it.
reports.error.title: Unable to load reports
reports.subtitle: Review every verification session in this workspace and reopen the evidence behind each result.
reports.title: Verification reports
result.errored.sub: The delivery checker could not run because of an internal error, so this result was not evaluated. Retry the verification or review it manually.
result.errored.title: Draft result
result.failed.sub: This result is held back. The delivery checker found verification insufficient and triggered a repair.
result.failed.title: Draft result
result.foot: A snapshot of this run’s result — not an assistant or user message.
result.passed.sub: The delivery checker passed {{passed}}/{{total}}. This result is ready to deliver.
result.passed.title: Result
result.pending.sub: The result is generated but not yet delivered — waiting for the delivery checker.
result.pending.title: Draft result
result.repairing.sub: Checks did not pass. A repair round has started.
result.repairing.title: Draft result
result.title: Verification #{{round}}
status.verifying: Delivery Checker: waiting for run to finish
templates.empty: Save checks as a template from a task to reuse them here.
templates.subtitle: Templates are saved delivery standards. Apply them from a task checker, then every run keeps its own frozen snapshot.
templates.title: Reusable templates
workspace.deleteConfirmDescription: Delete “{{title}}”? This report and its evidence will be removed.
workspace.emptyDetail.description: Pick a verification report from the list to see its verdict, checks, and evidence.
workspace.emptyDetail.title: No report selected
workspace.listEmpty: Reports appear here after a checker run finishes or a report is ingested.
workspace.loadError: Something went wrong while loading your reports.
workspace.standardsHint: Saved delivery standards will appear here.
workspace.title: Verify Reports
